summary: Refund Scam calls in Whitefield, caller pretends to be HDFC and asks for OTP, resulting in financial loss.
action_steps: Be cautious of unsolicited calls claiming to be from HDFC
Never share OTP or sensitive info over phone
reasoning: This scam has already resulted in a significant financial loss for a neighbour, highlighting the urgency of warning seniors.
source_text: Watch out for Refund Scam calls in Whitefield! Caller pretends to be HDFC, asks for OTP. My neighbour lost 40,000 rupees yesterday. Please warn seniors.
